title: EQ - Custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ, dialog present
scenario: Custom EQ save confirmation dialog does not display expected message and OK button per Figma spec
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
Adjust one or more frequency band sliders to change the EQ values.
expected: A dialog appears with the message "Your custom EQ has been saved." and an OK button at the bottom. The dialog UI matches the Figma specification.
